claims.claim: main_highlights:We cast sparse traffic sensing as fixed-infrastructure transportation network design for hidden-state recoverability.
main_highlights:TRACE-BiOpt commits one fixed layout under one recoverability-driven bilevel stochastic objective with a transparent inverse problem.

main_highlights:Current-best paired audits show strongest-baseline dominance on all nine tested dataset-budget rows, and Holm-corrected paired tests leave no statistically tied or better challenger across 21 pre-registered baselines spanning 11 method families.
main_highlights:The theory package covers MAP stability, posterior risk identity, CVaR tail-risk interpretation, layout-class generalization, and exchange-stationarity certificates.
main_highlights:A bounded exact benchmark exact-hits 27/27 deterministic 16-node subnetworks under the same objective.

mechanism_evidence:9/9 rows win all ten paired splits
